gradient_budget_mlp.note: 24 envs × 4096 n_steps = 98,304 samples/rollout; 98304/4096 = 24 minibatches × 10 epochs = 240 grad steps/rollout; at 100M steps → ~1,017 rollouts → ~244K total grad steps

gradient_budget_hierarchical.note: 24 envs × 2048 n_steps = 49,152 samples/rollout; 49152/256 = 192 minibatches × 10 epochs = 1920 grad steps/rollout; at 50M steps → ~1,017 rollouts → ~1.95M total grad steps

training_methods.standard: src/training/train.py — MLP PPO [2048,1024,512], default 100M steps, batch=4096, n_epochs=10
training_methods.hierarchical: src/training/train_hierarchical.py — BC(100 epochs) + Transformer+MoE PPO(50M, n_epochs=10)

pd_controller.reference: Go1 specs: 23.7 Nm hip/thigh, 35.55 Nm knee

reward_scales_v7.note: See REWARD_SCALES in src/env/cheetah_env.py for authoritative values
key_changes_from_v6: r_body_height: FIXED — removed -1.0 offset that made it always ≤0 (was a penalty, now proper [0,1] reward)
r_stillness: FIXED — exp kernel → 1/(1+x) rational kernel (was saturating to ~0.045 avg)
Survival multiplier: REMOVED — replaced with constant r_alive=0.5/step (RMA/legged_gym standard)
r_ang_vel_xy: ADDED — -0.05 × (ωx²+ωy²), legged_gym standard wobble penalty
r_smooth: L1 → L2 (paper consensus; L2 penalizes jerks more than cyclic motion)
r_linvel: 5.0 → 1.5 (closer to legged_gym 1.0; was dominating reward signal)
Stand mode: r_linvel=0, r_yaw=0 (disabled tracking; was 0.3)
Stand velocity: always zero (removed random small velocity)
Run mode: vx=[1.5,3.0] m/s (was [1.0,2.5]; Go1 supports 3.0)
Walk mode: vx=[0.3,0.8] m/s (was [0.2,1.0]; literature standard)
set_command(): now grants grace period on mode change (fixes interactive ctrl)
